class.name: PhysicsRayIntersectionResult2D
class.brief_description: Stores the result of a ray intersection query.
class.description: This object contains the intersection information produced by [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.intersect_ray]. After calling [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.intersect_ray], the fields of this object will be populated with the hit information if the ray intersects a shape. If no intersection occurred, the values remain unchanged from the previous state.

method.name: get_collider_id
method.description: Returns the unique ID of the intersected object.

method.name: get_collider_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the intersected object.

method.name: get_collider_shape
method.description: Returns the shape index of the intersected object's shape.

method.name: get_normal
method.description: Returns the surface normal at the intersection point. If the ray starts inside a shape and [member PhysicsRayQueryParameters2D.hit_from_inside] is [code]true[/code], this value may be [code]Vector2(0, 0)[/code].
